raw_text: ABBOTT, F.—b. 1916; ed. R.C. Convent, Littlehampton, and Angmering Olders Sch.; mil. serv., 1939–46; inspr. wks, P.W.D., Nig., 1950; W. Nig., 1954; senr. tech. offr., 1959. (Nig. Govt. service.)

ABBOTT, L.—b. 1921; ed. Kings Coll. Sch., Wimbledon; mil. serv., 1941–46, st. sgt. maj.; clerical offr., C.O., 1938; exec. offr., 1948; higher exec. offr., 1950; senr. exec. offr., 1958; ch. exec. offr., 1963; dep. estab. offr., 1964.

ABBOTT, Sir Myles, Kt.(1964).—b. 1906; ed. King’s Sch., Canterbury; barrister, Gray’s Inn; mil. serv., 1941–45, lieut.; asst. crown solvr., H.K., 1936; secn. to Ethiopian Govt. as pres., high ct., 1946; puisne judge, Nig., 1950; judge, high ct. of Lagos and Cams., 1955; fedl. justice, 1957; ch. just., Berm., 1961.
ABDULLAH, H.—b. 1927; med. offr., H.K., 1954; senr. med. and health offr., 1963.
ABRAHAM, R. H.—b. 1928; ed. Royal Coll., Maur., and Woolwich Poly., Lond.; o’seer, gr. II, Maur., 1950; inspr., gr. I, 1955; exec. engr., 1959.
ACHILLE, L. C.—b. 1929; ed. Camberwell Sch. of Arts and Crafts; wkman, gr.I., Maur., 1951; wkman. spec. gr., 1959; asst. warehouse foreman and timekeeper, 1962; asst. gov. printer, 1963.
ACTON, L. P.—b. 1918; apptd. Pal. police, 1938; asst. inspr., police, Nyas., 1949; insptr., 1951; asst. supt., 1953; supt. —; senr. supt., 1964. (Malawi Govt. service.)
ADAMS, C. W.—b. 1920; ed. Public Schs., and Melbourne Tech. Coll.; mil. serv., 1940–46; wireless offr., G. & E.I.C., 1949; chief wireless offr., 1953; compt., posts and telecoms., 1963.

ADAMS, G. W.—b. 1924; ed. Broughton Sec. Sch., Edin.; mil. serv. 1943–46; Br. P.O., 1941–56; E.A.P. & T. admin., serv. and sales supt., 1956; asst. tele. contrlr., 1958; senr. asst. 1961; contrlr. (servs.), 1963.

ADAMS, J. McP.—b. 1918; ed. Cranbrook Sch., Sydney, St. Peter’s Coll., Adelaide, Gonville and Caius Coll., Camb.; barrister-at-law, Inner Temple; a/asst. div. food offr., M.O.F., Camb.; high ct. prosecr. and mil. govt. prosecr., Control Commn., Germany; cr. couns., Nig., 1951; Sar., 1956; secon. dep. legal advr. Brunei, 1957–59; legal dfstmn., E. Nig., 1960; Swaz., 1961.
ADAMS, M. J.—b. 1918; cadet Nig. 1947; admin. offr. 1950; dist. offr. N. Rhod. 1950; secon. office of cmsnr. for N. Rhod. 1959; senr. D.O. gr. II., 1961; gr. I., 1962–63. (Zambia Govt. service.)

ADAMS, M. W.—b. 1929; ed. Ranelagh Gram. Sch., and City Lond. Coll.; mil. serv., 1947-49, R.A.F., rad. mech.; acctnt., Nig. Coll. Arts, Sc. and Techn., 1952; audtr. Ken., 1957; sen. audtr. G. & E.I.C., 1960.
ADAMS, Miss W. M.—b. 1910; ed. Edgehill Coll., Bideford; clk., N. Rhod., 1943; sec., Civil service comsn., 1950; asst. estab. offr., 1961; estab offr., 1964. (Zambia Govt. service.)

ADAMSON, A. R.—b. 1916; ed. Queen's Royal Coll., Trin., and Portsmouth Municipal Coll.; exec. engrn., Trin., 1947; asst. D.P.W., B. Guiana, 1958; chief engrn. (roads), 1958; dep. ch. wks. and hydraulics offr., 1963.
ADAMSON, J. C. M.—b. 1910; ed. Indville Coll., Edinburgh; temp. storekpr., S.L., 1944; stock verifier, 1949; storekpr. gr. I., 1953; ch. storekpr., 1961-65. (S.L. Govt. service.)
ADAMSON, P. V. C.—b. 1928; ed. Devonport High Sch., Plymouth Tech. Coll. and Univ. Coll., Exeter; educ. offr., Sarawak, secon. Brunei, 1954; trans. Brunei, 1959.

ADDI, M.—b. 1917; ed. Bishop Gobat Sch., Jerusalem; posts and tels. depts., Pal., 1936-48; Pal. accts. clearance office, Cyp., 1948-49; C.O., 1949-50; asst. postmaster, Nyasa., 1950; asst. acctnt., 1952; acctnt., 1955; secon., Fed. of Rhod. and Nyasa., 1954-56; acctnt., posts and tels., dept., N. Borneo, 1957; sen. postal acctnt., P.O., H.K., 1959; ch. postal acctnt., 1962.
ADDY, B. L.—b. 1932; livestock offr., Nyas., 1955; senr. scientific offr., 1964. (Malawi Govt. service.)
ADLARD, P. G.—b. 1926; ed. St. Edward's Sch., Oxford and Exeter Coll., Oxford; mil. serv., 1945-47, R.N.; asst. consvr. (forests), Nyas., 1953; silviculturist, 1961-65. (Malawi Govt. service.)

ADSHEAD, J. D.—b. 1928; ed. Stockport Gram. Sch., St. Catharine's Coll., Camb., and Univ. Coll., London; survr., N. Nig., 1954; senr. survr., 1960; prin. survr., 1962; asst. survr.-gen., 1965. (Nig. Govt. service.)

ADSHEAD, J. W., M.B.E. (1965).—b. 1923; ed. Tennehall Coll., Staffs., Blundell's Sch., and Birmingham Univ.; mil. serv., 1942-47; senr. auditor, N. Nig., 1958; prin. auditor, Gam., 1960; redesig. dir. audit, 1963-65. (Gambia Govt. service.)
AERS, I. B.—b. 1921; ed. Dulwich Coll., and Sandhurst; mil. serv., 1939-48, major (desps.); cadet Tang., 1948; dist. offr., 1950; Swaz., 1963.
AFFARA, M. S., M.B.E. (1963).—b. 1934; ed. Bayoomi Coll., Aden; clk., Aden, 1953; jnr. asst. advr., 1954; asst. advr., 1959; admin. offr., cl. III, 1963.

AGG, A. D.—b. 1912; ed. S.A. Collegiate Sch., Cape Town; mil. serv., 1939-40, 2nd lieut.; archt. asst., P.W.D., N. Rhod., 1938; asst. archt., 1945; archt., 1949; senr. archt., 1951; asst. D.P.W. (buildings), Nyasa., 1955; ret. re-appt. sen. archt., E. Nig., 1959; ch. archt., 1961. (Nig. Govt. service.)

AGOSTINI, C.—b. 1914; ed. St. Mary's Coll., Trin.; control offr., Trin., 1941; dep. aerodrome supt., 1946; dir. of civil aviation, and aerodrome supt., 1947; loaned to I.C.A.O., civ. aviation, Dominican Republic, 1956-57. (T'dad. Govt. service.)
AHMED, M. H. C.—b. 1913; prob. labr. inspr., Maur., 1938; labr. inspr., 1940; labr. field offr., 1946; asst. labr. comsnt., 1950; redesig. sen. labr. offr; prin. labr. offr., 1964.

AINLEY, Sir John, Kt. (1957), M.C.—b. 1906; ed. St. Bees Sch. and Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford; barrister-at-law, Gray's Inn; mil. serv., 1939-45, maj.; dist. mag., G.C., 1935; cr. coun., 1936; puisne judge, Uga., 1946; ch. just., E. Nig., 1953; S'wak., N. Borneo and Brunei, 1959; Ken., 1962. (Ken. Govt. service.)
AINLEY, J. M.—b. 1925; ed. Huddersfield Coll. Sch., Bridlington Gram. Sch. and Yorks. Inst. of Agric.; field offr., agric., Tang., 1949; agric. offr., 1958-65. (Tanzania Govt. service.)

AINSWORTH, T. M.—b. 1920; ed. Hyde Gram. Sch.; admin. offr., Nig., 1948; secon. Mal., 1951-54; admin. offr., Sarawak, 1956; secon. Brunei, 1958; dist. offr., S'wak., 1959-63; retd., apptd. asst. advrs., Aden, 1966.

AITCHISON, G. L., M.B.E. (1965).—b. 1920; ed. Cathedral Boys Sch., Shanghai, St. Albans Sch., and Selwyn Coll., Camb.; mil. serv., 1941-46, maj.; admin. cadet, Nig., 1947; district offr., 1952; senr. district offr., 1962; under sec. (estabs.), 1964. (Nig. Govt. service.)

AKEROYD, A.—b. 1911; ed. St. Luke's Sch. and Cockburn High Sch., Leeds; asst. civ. engr., Admirty., 1943; civ. engr., 1945; archt. N. Rhod., 1947; senr. archt., 1955; dep. dir. wks., 1961-64 (Zambia Govt. service.)
AKERS-JONES, D.—b. 1927; ed. Worthing High Sch. and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; Merchant Navy, 1944-45, third offr.; appt. M.C.S., 1953; admin. offr., H.K., 1957; senr. admin. offr., 1962.
AKOW, L. G.—b. 1927; ed. St. Mary's Coll., Trin., Univ. Coll., Dublin and King's Coll., London; educ. offr., S.L., 1958; princ. gr. II, 1963. (S.L. Govt. service.)
ALBURY, F. C. W.—b. 1904; ed. privately; wireless operator, Bah., 1918; sec., bd. of agric., 1924; senr. agric. offr., 1954; dep. dir., agric., 1957.
ALBURY, K. H. E.—b. 1920; ed. Govt. High Sch., Nassau; clk., public treasy., Bah., 1940; asst. audr., 1950; audr., 1956.

ALCANTARA, J. E.—b. 1926; ed. Christian Bros. Coll., Gib., Univ. Coll., Lond.; Linc. Inn, 1946; mem. city coun., 1954-56; mem. leg. coun., 1954-57; regsr. sup. ct., 1957; judge ct. of first inst. and stip. mag., 1963.
ALCINDOR, E. G., C.P.M. (1953).—b. 1913; asst. supt. police, Trin., 1951; supt., 1958; senr. supt., 1963. (Trin. Govt. service.)

ALDEN, J. W., M.B.E. (1945).—b. 1916; ed. Sloane Sch., Chelsea; mil. serv., 1939-46; rev. clk., Ken., 1946; rev. offr., 1947; tax offr., E.A.C.S.O., 1950; immigr. offr., Uga., 1952; senr. immigr. offr., 1962-64; retd.; apptd. passport offr., Aden, 1966.
ALDERMAN, Miss E. J.—b. 1930; ed. Skipton Girls' High Sch., Manchester Royal Infirmary and Royal Coll. of Nursing; nursing sister (leprosy service), E. Nig., 1956. (Nig. Govt. service.)

ALDOUS, L. W.—b. 1913; ed. Stationers' Co. Sch., and L.S.E., London Univ.; mil. serv., 1939-45, capt.; F.O. (German section) control comsnr. for Germany, 1946-49; devel. asst., Uga., 1952; asst. sec., 1954; senr. asst. sec., 1955; under sec., 1958; sec., E.A.C.S.O., 1960; princ. econ. offr.

ALDOUS, P. E.—b. 1918; ed. New Plymouth High Sch. and Victoria Univ. Coll., N.Z.; mil. serv., 1939-44, (N.Z.A.) capt.; cadet, N. Rhod., 1949; dist. offr., 1951; admin. offr., gr. II, 1962; asst. sec., 1964. (Zambia Govt. service.)

ALEXANDER, D. A. R., O.B.E. (1963).—b. 1920; ed. St. Mary's Coll., St. Lucia, and Univ. Coll., London; barrister-at-law, Middle Temple; dep. clk. of courts, J'ca, 1944; mag., Turks and Caicos Is., 1947; clk. of courts, J'ca, 1949; asst. legal dftsnnr., 1951; legal dftsnnr., 1955; W. Nig., 1957; solr.-gen. (Nig. Govt. service.)

ALEXANDER, D. R. W., M.B.E.(Mil.)—b. 1918; ed. Montrose Academy and Edin. Univ.; mil. serv., 1939-46, lt. col.; admin. cadet, Nig., 1946; reaps. 1947; reap. admin. offr., gr. III, Som., 1948; gr. II, 1948; secon. Cyrenaica, 1948-53; gr. I, chief sec., min. of interior, 1951; cadet offr. cl. II, H. K., 1953; ch. asst. soc. wel. and asst. sec. Chinese affrs., 1954; comsnr., E.S.C. and ch. staff offr. C.A.S., 1956; asst. D.U.S., 1958; admin. offr., staff gr. C, 1959; chmn. U.C., 1960; mem. leg. co., 1960; asst. dir. soc. wel., 1962; dep. comsnr. labr. and mines, 1963; admin. offr. st. gr. B., 1964; comsnr. labr. and mines, 1965.

ALEXANDER, J.—b. 1909; ed. Aberdeen Gram. Sch. and Aberdeen Univ.; mil. serv., 1939-45, W.S./capt., R.E.; engr., H. K., 1949; asst. chief engr., 1957; chief engr., 1958; asst. D.P.W., 1961; govt. civil engr., 1964.

ALEXANDER, J. B., C.B.E.—b. 1912; ed. Tiffin Boys' Sch., Kingston-on-Thames, Imp. Coll. of Science and Tech., London Univ. and California Inst. of Tech., U.S.A.; interned, 1942-45; geologist, Nyasa., 1935; F.M.S., 1939; prin. geol., Fed. of Mal., 1950; dep. dir., geol. survey, 1957; dir., geol. survey.
ALEXIS, F. C.—b. 1913; ed. Grenada Boys' Secondary Sch. and Royal Coll. of Surgeons, Edin.; dist. med. offr., St. V., 1935; supt. physician, col. hosp., Grenada, 1952; S.M.O., 1955.

ALLAN, A. J., Q.P.M. (1963), C.P.M. (1954).—b. 1920; ed. Boroughmuir High Sch., Edin.; mil. serv., 1939-42; asst. insp., police, Ken., 1942; asst. supt., 1948; supt., 1952; senr. supt., 1954; asst. comsnr., 1960-65. (Ken. Govt. service.)

ALLAN, C. H., O.B.E. (1959)—b. 1921; ed. Hamilton High Sch., Canterbury Univ. Coll., N.Z., and Camb. Univ.; mil. serv., 1942-44; cadet, B.S.I.P., 1945; admin. offr., cl. B., 1949; secon. spec. lands comsnr., 1954; cl. A., 1955; senr. asst. sec., W. Pac. H.C., 1957; secon. N. Hebs., 1958.

ALLAN, D. A. G., M.C.—b. 1918; ed. Geo. Watson's Coll., Edin., and Edin. Univ.; mil. serv., 1939-47, major; exec. engr., Ken., 1948; senr. exec. engr., Nyasa., 1956; ch. plannng. engr., 1962. (Malawi Govt. service.)
ALLAN, G. A.—b. 1924; ed. Broughton Sec. Sch.; mil. serv., 1945-47, R.N.; Br. P.O., 1940-50; techn., gr. I, E.A.P.& T. admin., 1950; asst. engr., gr. II, 1956; gr. I, 1960; senr. asst. engr., 1962.

ALLAN, J.A.B., C.M.G. (1965).—b. 1911; ed. Douai Sch.; mil. serv., 1945-48 (desps.), lt.-col.; supt., prisons, Mal., 1948; senr. supt., Uga., 1956; dep. comsnr., prisons, 1958; comsnr. prisons, Ken., 1961-64; ret., apptd. advsr., prison services, Ken., 1964. (Ken. Govt. service.)

ALLAN, T. G.—b. 1927; ed. Moray Hse., Royal High and Borough Muir Schs. Edin., Edin. Univ.; mil. serv., 1945-48; asst. consvr. forests, Fiji, 1951; N. Rhod., 1958; consvr., 1964. (Zambia Govt. service.)
ALLAN, W. G. L.—b. 1923; ed. Trinity Coll., Glenalmond, and Aberdeen Univ.; M.O. Tang, 1951; M.O. Hong Kong, 1954; snr. med. and health offr., 1959; prin. M. & H.O., 1963.
ALLEN, M. D.—b. 1929; ed. Abbots-holme Sch., Derbyshire and St. Andrews Univ.; mil. serv., 1947-49, 13th/18th Hussars; cadet, Aden, 1954; admin. offr., cl. B, N. Heb., 1958; B.S.I.P., 1963.
ALLEN, S. J. H.—b. 1927; ed. Ardingly Coll.; Pal. police, 1946-48; survr., D.O.S., 1949; staff survr., S. Leone, 1956; asst. dir., survey, 1960. (S.L. Govt. service.)
ALLEYNE, C. G.—b. 1923; ed. Combermere Sch., Barb.; clk. 1942; inspr. of income tax, 1945; stats. clk., 1955; stats. asst., 1956; asst. govt. stat., 1961; govt. stat., 1964.

ALLISON, J. A., O.B.E.—b. 1915; ed. St. John's Coll., Jo'burg, and Witwatersrand Univ.; mil. serv., 1940-46, major; admin. offr., cl. IV, Nig., 1938; D.O., 1946; Bech. Prot., 1950; high comsnr.'s office, 1950-51; senr. D.O., fin. sec., 1958; admin. sec., 1962; perm. sec., min. home affrs., 1963.
ALLOTT, N. L.—b. 1932; ed. The High Sch. for Boys, Scarborough; actng. asst., gr. IV, E.A.R. & H., 1955; gr. III, 1956; gr. II, 1959; gr. I, 1963; asst. acctnt., 1964.

ALLSEBROOK, G. P.—b. 1918; ed. Stowe Sch., Kent Sch., Conn., U.S.A. and Trinity Coll., Oxford; barrister-at-law, Middle Temple; mil. serv., 1939-43, capt.; cadet, Tang., 1940; D.O., 1942; admin. offr., cl. IIB, 1958; secon., admnr., Virgin Is., 1956-59; dep. prov. comsnr. Tang., 1960; admin. offr., cl. IIA, 1961; admin. sec., 1962. (Tanzania Govt. service.)

ALLWRIGHT, W. C.—b. 1915; ed. Rutlish Sch., Merton, and King's Coll. Hosp., Univ. of London; mil. serv., 1940-46, sqdn. ldr.; dental surg., H.K., 1947; senr., 1949; redesig. dental specialist, 1951; senr. dental spec., 1959-65. H.K. rep. at W.H.O. dental health seminar, N.Z., 1954.
ALP, W. C.—b. 1907; ed. Christ's Hosp. and London Univ.; mil. serv., 1940-45; archt., P.W.D., Ken., 1948. (Ken. Govt. service.)
ALVES, J. V.—b. 1915; ed. St. Vincent Gram. Sch.; clk., 1938; sec. control dept., 1944; inc. tax inspr., 1951; publ. rel. and loc. govt. offr., 1956; perm. sec., chief min. off., 1960.

AMBROSE, H. B.—b. 1924; ed. Aldenham Sch., Wye Coll., London Univ., and Christ's Coll., Camb.; mil. serv., 1942-46, R.M.; agric. offr. (exper.), Ken., 1950; agric. research offr., Nyasa., 1957; ch. agric. research offr., 1965. (Malawi Govt. service.)
AMBROSE, J.—b. 1914; ed. Wade Deacon Gram. Sch., Widnes; mil. serv., 1935-45, sgt. (desps.); chargeman mech., Tang., 1950; inspr. mech., 1952; ch. inspr. mech., 1963-65. (Tanzania Govt. service.)

AMBROSE, J. W. D.—b. 1909; ed. Free Sch., Penang and Keble Coll., Oxford; barrister-at-law, Inner Temple; asst. offr. assignee, S'pore, 1936; police mag. and asst. dist. judge, Malacca, 1940; registr., superior ct., 1945; dep. publ. prosecutor, N. Sembilan, 1946; senr. asst. registr., supreme cts. of Ipoh, Penang, K. Lumpur, 1947-52; pres., sessions ct., Penang, 1953; ag. dist. judge and 1st mag., S'pore, 1955; off. assignee, public trustee, comsnr. of estate duties, etc., 1957; puisne judge, 1958.

AMES, Sir Cecil, Kt. (1965).—b. 1897; ed. Dover Coll.; admin. offr., 1922; asst. judge, Nig. Prot., 1934; judge, 1945; ret. 1950; re-apptd. temp. judge, Gamb.; just. of appeal, W. Afr. ct. of appeal; comsnr. rev. of laws; pres. S.L. and Gamb., ct. of appeal, 1962.
AMORY, G. E.—b. 1913; ed. Harrison Coll., Barb.; cadet, post office, Barb.; clk., savings bank and treasury, 1943; inspr., inland rev., 1953; acctnt., savings bank, 1961; govt. printer, 1965.
AMPUTCH, J., M.B.E. (1959)—b. 1911; labr. inspr., Fiji, 1944; labr. offr., 1950; senr., 1957; comsnr., labr., 1960.

ANDERSEN, V. J., C.M.G. (1965), O.B.E. (1960), M.B.E. (1955), V.R.D. (1962).—b. 1919; ed. Napier and Auckland Univ. Coll., N.Z.; mil. serv., 1940-46; cadet, B.S.I.P., 1943; admin. offr., cl. B, 1950; cl. A, 1954; senr. asst. sec. (native affrs.), W. Pac. H.C., 1955; sec., prot. affrs., 1958; resdt. cmnsr., G.E.I.C., 1962.

ANDERSON, A. H., M.B.E. (1957).—b. 1901; ed. privately; p.s. to gov., B. Hond., 1927; asst. contrlr., food and prices, 1939; contrlr., 1940; dist. comsnr., 1942; asst. sec. and archaeol. comsnr., 1953; archaeol. comsnr. (full-time), 1957.
ANDERSON, A. M.—b. 1924; ed. Dollar Acad., and St. Andrew's Univ.; mil. serv., 1943-46, capt.; fisheries offr., N. Borneo, 1949; Uga., 1953; senr., 1958. (Uga. Govt. service.)

ANDERSON, C. P.—b. 1922; ed. Trinity Acad., Edin., and Heriot Watt Coll.; mil. serv., 1939-53; techn., gr. I, E.A.P. & T., admin. 1953; asst. engnr. gr. II, 1955; gr. I, 1957; senr. asst. engnr., 1962; senr. sect. engnr., 1964.
ANDERSON, E. A.—b. 1908; ed. Diocesan High Sch., Belize, and Toronto Univ.; apprentice surveyor, B. Hond., 1929; govt. surveyor, 1932; senr. surveyor, 1953; prin. surveyor, 1961-65.

ANDERSON, G. A.—b. 1914; ed. Redhill Tech. Coll.; mil. serv., 1939-46, lt. R.N.V.R.; senr. elec. engnr., N. Rhod., 1957; dep. ch. elec. engnr., 1963; dir., Northern Electricity Supply Corp. (Zambia Govt. service.)
ANDERSON, J. A. R., M.C. and bar.—b. 1922; ed. Durham Sch., and Edin. Univ.; mil. serv., 1940-46; asst. consvr. forests, S'wak., 1951; forest research offr., 1963; dep. consvr., 1964.
ANDERSON, K. L. C.—b. 1929; ed., Tonbridge Sch.; staff surveyor, Uga., 1951. (Uga. Govt. service.)

ANDERSON, R. G.—b. 1926; ed. Haileybury, Imp. Service Coll. and Oriel Coll. Oxford; mil. serv., 1944-48, R.N.V.R. lieut. (special); admin. cadet, Nig., 1950; p.s. to Gov. E. Nig., 1952; admin. offr., cl. III, 1953; asst. dist. comsnr., Uga., 1958; dist. comsnr., 1960; asst. sec. min. agric. and co-ops., 1962; prin. asst. sec., 1964. (Uga. Govt. service.)

ANDERSON, Lieut.-Col. S. A., M.V.O. (1966), M.B.E. (1961), Q.P.M. (1966), C.P.M.—b. 1916; ed. Jamaica, Metrop. Police Training Course, London, and Fingerprint Course and Criminal Record Office Course, New Scotland Yard; mil. serv., 1939-45; I'ca. constab., 1936; supt., police, St. V., 1954; redesig. ch. of police, 1962.

ANDREW, M. A., M.C.—b. 1919; ed. Waitaki Boys' High Sch. and Otago Univ., N.Z.; mil. serv., 1939-45, maj., R.N.Z.E.; cadet, Pal., 1946; N. Rhod., 1948; dist. offr., 1949; admin. offr., cl. B, G. and E.I.C., 1956; B.S.I.P., 1957; cl. A, 1958, estab. sec., W.P.H.C., 1962.
ANDREW, R. C.—b. 1927; ed. Headington Sec. Sch., Ruskin Coll. and St. John's Coll., Oxford; mil. serv., 1945-47; cadet N. Rhod., 1953; D.O. 1955-65. (Zambia Govt. service.)
ANDREWS, A. L.—b. 1924; ed. Loretto Sch.; mil. serv., 1942-47, capt.; cadet N. Rhod., 1949; dist. offr., 1951; admin. offr., gr. I., 1963; under sec., 1964. (Zambia Govt. service.)
ANDREWS, C. G.—b. 1922; ed. Architectural Assoc.; architect, Uga., 1945; chief architect, 1956-65. (Uga. Govt. service.)
ANDREWS, O.—b. 1909; ed. N. Poly. Coll., Lond.; mil. serv., 1941-46, R.A.F.; bldg. inspr., Tang., 1950; asst. quant. surv., 1954; quant. surv., 1956. (Tanzania Govt. service.)
ANDREWS-JONES, D. A.—b. 1931; ed. Univ. of Durham; geol., S.L. 1953; asst. dir., geological div., min. of lands, mines and lab., 1965. (S.L. Govt. service.)

ANGELO-THOMSON, W. T.—b. 1908; ed. Dulwich Coll., Marcy's Sch., and Law Society Sch. of Law; solicitor, Eng.; mil. serv., 1939, W.O. staff, 1941-53; H.M. land registry, 1937-38; asst. prosecutor (ch. legal off.) L.P.T.B., 1938; registr., sup. ct., and registr.-gen., Berm., 1954.

ANGELONI, R., O.B.E. (1962), M.B.E.—b. 1920; ed. Lycée Lakanal, France, Sevenoaks Sch. and St. Catharine's Coll., Camb.; mil. serv., 1941-42; cadet, Nig., 1942; cl. III, 1950; cl. B, W. Pac., 1955; secon., admin. offr., N. Heb., 1955; cl. A offr., 1958; asst. rsdt. cmsnr., G.E.I.C., 1962-66.

ANGOY, S. A.—b. 1911; ed. Berbice High Sch., B. Guiana, and Combermere Sch., Barb.; cler. asst., B. Guiana, 1931; clk., 1935-47; senr. acctng. offr., 1947; chief clk., 1951; asst. sec., 1956; local sec., Camb. local exams synd., 1939-50, Univ. of London exams., 1941-50; sec., B. Guiana sugar exper. stns. comtee, 1951-56; prin. asst. sec., 1964.

ANGOY, W. A.—b. 1907; ed. Berbice High Sch., B. Guiana, and Combermere Sch., Barb.; prob., customs dept., B. Guiana, 1926; asst. dist. cmsnr., interior dept., 1947; dist. cmsnr., local govt., 1953; comm. dev. offr., 1961; redesig. dep. ch. soc. dev. offr., 1962.
ANGUS, F. D.—b. 1909; ed. Victoria British Sch., and Central British Sch., H.K.; apptd. H.K., 1927; assessor, gr. II, inland rev. dept., 1947; gr. I, 1949; chief assessor, 1959.
ANSELL, M.—b. 1921; ed. St. Mark's Sch., Mbabane, Swaz.; mil. serv., 1943-46; trooper, Swaz. police, 1938; asst. supt., 1944; supt., 1951; secon., Basuto mounted police, 1949-52.
